humility.name: Prostration
humility.description: You prostrate before God. The enemy's next attack is weakened.

humility.name: Kenosis
humility.description: Self-emptying strike. You pour yourself out, gaining strength in the void.

humility.name: Stillness
humility.description: From inner silence, a precise and devastating blow.

humility.name: Tears of Repentance
humility.description: Holy grief dissolves the enemy's defenses.

humility.name: Meekness
humility.description: The meek inherit the earth — and deal significant damage.

humility.name: Self-Reproach
humility.description: You take the blame willingly. Your enemy cannot understand this strength.

humility.name: Holy Foolishness
humility.description: Foolishness for Christ — unpredictable and devastating.

humility.name: Non-Acquisition
humility.description: You release all attachment. The demon has nothing to grasp.

humility.name: Apophatic Strike
humility.description: You attack through what you are not. Pure negation as weapon.

humility.name: Theotic Annihilation
humility.description: Total self-offering. The pride-demon cannot survive this light.

courage.name: Stand Firm
courage.description: You hold the line. Gain 1 Courage on kill.

courage.name: Holy Boldness
courage.description: Parrhesia — the freedom of speech before God and men.

courage.name: Witness
courage.description: You bear witness to the truth with your body.

courage.name: Martyric Strike
courage.description: The martyr does not flinch. Your blow carries that resolve.

courage.name: Fearless Love
courage.description: Perfect love casts out fear — and your enemy.

courage.name: Confessor's Blow
courage.description: You confess the faith with your fists.

courage.name: Warrior's Cross
courage.description: You bear the cross willingly. It becomes your weapon.

courage.name: Harrowing
courage.description: As Christ harrowed hell, you descend to strike the deep.

courage.name: Unconquerable
courage.description: Aniketos — the undefeated. Nothing breaks you now.

courage.name: Resurrection Charge
courage.description: Death has no dominion. Your final blow carries eternal force.

temperance.name: Fast
temperance.description: Abstinence sharpens the will. Removes 1 debuff.

temperance.name: Nepsis
temperance.description: Watchfulness — you wait for the perfect moment.

temperance.name: Enkrateia
temperance.description: Self-mastery. Your body obeys your spirit completely.

temperance.name: Apatheia
temperance.description: Freedom from passion — you strike without anger or fear.

temperance.name: Holy Sobriety
temperance.description: Sober in spirit and devastating in precision.

temperance.name: Measured Wrath
temperance.description: Anger in its right proportion — righteous and controlled.

temperance.name: Controlled Burning
temperance.description: The passions channeled, not suppressed. Focused destruction.

temperance.name: Purified Desire
temperance.description: All longing redirected to God — nothing wasted on the enemy.

temperance.name: Hesychia
temperance.description: Perfect stillness from which all things flow.

temperance.name: Deified Matter
temperance.description: Your body, fully sanctified, becomes an instrument of grace.

wisdom.name: Discernment
wisdom.description: You see through the mask. Reveals weakness if Wisdom ≥ 3.

wisdom.name: Logos Strike
wisdom.description: The Word made weapon. Precise as divine reason.

wisdom.name: Theoria
wisdom.description: Contemplative vision — you see the enemy's true nature.

wisdom.name: Anagoge
wisdom.description: Upward movement — you elevate the fight above its passions.

wisdom.name: Philokalia
wisdom.description: Love of the beautiful — you strike at the ugly without mercy.

wisdom.name: Doxology
wisdom.description: Praise as weapon. The demon cannot abide glory given to God.

wisdom.name: Cataphatic Light
wisdom.description: You name the good the enemy denies. Truth as strike.

wisdom.name: Uncreated Beam
wisdom.description: The Tabor Light — not from you, but through you.

wisdom.name: Pneumatic Sight
wisdom.description: Spiritual eyes fully open. Nothing is hidden from you.

wisdom.name: Divine Sophia
wisdom.description: Wisdom herself strikes through you. The enemy has no counter.

love.name: Philoxenia
love.description: Love of the stranger — even your enemy is someone to be redeemed.

love.name: Intercession
love.description: You pray for the fallen. The prayer lands like a blow.

love.name: Sacrifice
love.description: You offer yourself. The demon does not understand this exchange.

love.name: Eros Transformed
love.description: Desire fully turned toward God — nothing else has power.

love.name: Mercy Strike
love.description: You strike mercifully — quickly, cleanly, without cruelty.

love.name: Communion
love.description: You share yourself with the enemy. They cannot hold that light.

love.name: Theanthropy
love.description: God-man love: divine and human united in your strike.

love.name: Perichoresis
love.description: Mutual indwelling — you move through the enemy's defenses.

love.name: Divine Eros
love.description: The consuming love of God. Nothing survives it.
